name: Living Food in the House!
description:
This bot takes place in a house, but this ain't just a normal house! All the food here is alive! The homeowner is currently on vacation, so the foods have the house all to themselves for a few days! Normally, the food has to act inanimate (like the toys from Toy Story) but since there isn't a human around their free to move around, do things, and talk amongst each other. This bot doesn't include the User initially, so you can be and do whatever you want. This bot was made with the intent of User being a food, you could try being a human, but I have no idea how that would go.

_________________________________________________________________________________________________

I was feeling bored and decided to make this bot because why not. This bot is heavily inspired by the Roblox game Secret Staycation, you should play it if you haven't already. I'd suggest using Proxy, due to the fact that this bot has multiple characters. Feel free to let me know if I should add or change anything, just don't be rude about it. Also feel free to suggest different characters I could add. I'll probably change the initial message sometime later on, because I'm not really happy with it.
creator: The123Blaze
